ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "uk_mens_size" TEXT /* UK men's size (e.g., S, M, L, XL, XXL) */,
  "neck_in" TEXT /* Neck measurement in inches */,
  "neck_cm" TEXT /* Neck measurement in centimeters */,
  "chest_in" TEXT /* Chest measurement in inches */,
  "chest_cm" TEXT /* Chest measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_in" TEXT /* Sleeve measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_cm" TEXT /* Sleeve measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_in" TEXT /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "waist_cm" TEXT /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "inseam_in" TEXT /* Inseam measurement in inches */,
  "inseam_cm" TEXT /* Inseam measurement in centimeters */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Fit type (e.g., slim fit, regular fit, relaxed fit) */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style (e.g., casual, formal, business) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the color of the product */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "description" TEXT /* Product description */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was added */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the color */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hex code of the color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "properties" TEXT /* Properties of the material (e.g., breathable, waterproof) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the store */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the store */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock at the store */,
  "low_stock_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for low stock alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product sold */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the sale occurred */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Price at which the product was sold */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, staff, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the variant */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the color of the variant */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the variant */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the variant in stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_info" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_reorder_levels" (
  "reorder_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reorder level */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the threshold is reached */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for reordering (e.g., when stock quantity falls below this level) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reorder_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_reorder_levels_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
